---
title: "test_synapse_auth_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_synapse_auth_empire.py"
loc: 20
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.07
style_score: 3.62
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.24
---

## Intent
The `test_synapse_auth_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_persona_verifier_challenge, test_persona_verifier_handshake, test_persona_verifier_secret. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_persona_verifier_challenge, test_persona_verifier_handshake, test_persona_verifier_secret. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [src.synapse.synapse_auth](file://src.synapse.synapse_auth)

### Exports
- `test_persona_verifier_challenge`
- `test_persona_verifier_handshake`
- `test_persona_verifier_secret`
